loyaltyProgram.title: Loyalty Program
loyaltyProgram.subtitle: Manage your loyalty card and program settings
loyaltyProgram.configureProgram: Set up your loyalty program rules and data collection
loyaltyProgram.qrCodeHint: QR code downloads are available in the scanner app
loyaltyProgram.dataCollectionDescription: Collect this information when customers sign up for their loyalty card.
loyaltyProgram.anonymousModeNote: Collecting no data enables anonymous mode — customers can sign up without providing any information.
loyaltyProgram.anonymousModeWarning: Anonymous mode is active. Customers won't need to fill any form, but you won't be able to identify them. They won't be able to recover a lost card or sync across devices, and you won't be able to contact them.

overview.title: Loyalty Program
overview.subtitle: Your program at a glance

steps.configureDescription: Name your program, choose how many stamps, and set a reward your customers will love.
steps.createDescription: Make it yours — pick colors, add your logo, and create a card that matches your brand.
steps.reviewDescription: Your card was created during setup. Open the editor to fine-tune colors, content, and branding.
steps.activateDescription: Activate your card so customers can start collecting stamps in their wallet.
steps.customizeDescription: Personalize the messages customers see when they earn stamps or unlock rewards.
steps.backFieldsDescription: Add an address, website, phone number or email that will appear on the back of every card you create — keeping things consistent and saving you time. You can always opt out when designing a new card.
steps.firstCustomerDescription: Share your signup link or QR code — it only takes one scan to get started.
steps.firstBroadcastDescription: Reach your customers where they already look — straight to their wallet card.
steps.teamInvitedDescription: Add the people who'll stamp customers at your point of sale.
steps.planChosenDescription: Lock in the features you want before your free trial ends.

overview.programLinkDescription: Share this with customers to download their loyalty card
overview.scanToAdd: Scan to add loyalty card to wallet
overview.notificationsDescription: Automatic messages sent to customers on loyalty events
overview.broadcastsDescription: Send promotional messages to all your customers at once

loyaltyProgram.programNameHelp: Appears on the card and in your customers' notifications.
loyaltyProgram.stampsDescription: How many stamps customers need to earn the reward
loyaltyProgram.rewardSubtitle: What customers get when they complete their card
loyaltyProgram.rewardDescriptionPlaceholder: Get a free coffee after collecting all stamps
loyaltyProgram.programDetailsSubtitle: The basics of your loyalty program
loyaltyProgram.stampsTypeDesc: Customers collect stamps with each visit. Simple and familiar.
loyaltyProgram.pointsTypeDesc: Customers earn points per purchase. Flexible redemption.
loyaltyProgram.tieredTypeDesc: Bronze, Silver, Gold levels with increasing perks.

dataFields.name: Name
dataFields.nameDescription: Identify your customers, personalize their card and notifications
dataFields.emailDescription: Enable pass recovery, email campaigns, and customer lookup
dataFields.phoneDescription: Collect it if you'd like to reach customers yourself — Stampeo doesn't send SMS.

locations.title: Locations
locations.subtitle: Manage your physical stores and where each stamp is issued.
locations.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, slug, or address

error.title: Couldn't load your locations
error.description: Something went wrong fetching this list. Check your connection and try again.

starter.headline: Manage every store from one place
starter.description: Register all your locations and tailor messaging by store.

features.multiple: Unlimited stores with their own QR codes

empty.title: Add your first location
empty.description: Tag every stamp and signup with the store where it happened. Filter, analyze, and assign scanners per location.

card.noAddress: No address — tap to add one
card.membersCount: {count, plural, =0 {No scanners assigned} one {# scanner} other {# scanners}}

form.name: Location name
form.slugTaken: This slug is already used by another location.
form.addressHelp: Optional — useful for customer-facing context and future geofencing. Mobile businesses (food trucks, pop-ups) can skip it.
form.searchAddressPlaceholder: Start typing a business name or address
form.autocompleteError: Couldn't load suggestions. Try again or enter manually.
form.cannotFindBusiness: Can't find your business? Enter manually
form.manualWarning: Coordinates are needed for scanner location detection — enter them precisely if you can.
form.coordinatesHelp: Only needed if you want auto-location detection on the scanner app.
form.radiusHelp: Distance from this location within which customers will see your wallet message and scanners are assumed to be on-site.
form.walletMessageHelp: Future geofence message shown when a customer is near this store. Optional.
form.alreadyPrimary: This is already your primary location.
form.setPrimaryConfirm: This will demote your current primary location and make this one your customer-facing default. Continue?

create.title: Add a location
create.description: Customers visiting this location's URL will be enrolled here. You can assign scanners after creating it.
create.backfillToast: {name} created — {transactions} past stamps and {customers} customers linked here.

edit.title: Edit location
edit.description: Update this location's details. Changes apply to the printed QR and the enrollment URL immediately.

step1.title: Identity
step1.subtitle: What is this location called and where will customers enroll?

step2.title: Where is it?
step2.subtitle: Address and optional geofencing for the scanner app. All fields are optional.

step3.title: Wallet message
step3.subtitle: Optional message shown on the back of the wallet pass for customers enrolled here.

wizard.primaryHelp: The primary location catches customers and activity that aren't linked to a specific store.
wizard.alreadyPrimary: This is already your primary location.

backfill.label: Link my past activity to this location
backfill.help: Every stamp, signup, and redemption from before now will be tagged to this location. This can't be undone.

detail.noMembers: No scanners assigned yet. Owners and admins can always stamp here.
detail.membersUpsellDescription: On Pro, scanners only see and stamp the locations they're assigned to.
detail.qrUnavailable: QR code generator is not available.
detail.qrUpsellDescription: Print a per-location QR so customers enrolled at the right store from the start.
detail.statsUpsellDescription: See how each store is performing in isolation, not just the global view.
detail.deleteUpgrade: Upgrade to Pro to delete locations.
detail.deleteDescription: Scanner assignments will be cleared and this location will no longer appear in filters. Existing transactions keep their location tag for history.
detail.cannotDeletePrimary: Promote another location to primary before deleting this one.

members.noCandidates: Every scanner is already assigned here.
